Summary
Fixes several issues with ModelOpt quantization config loading for NemotronH (and future models that move away from hf_quant_config.json). Ensures models can load from config.json's embedded quantization_config without requiring the legacy hf_quant_config.json file.

vllm.author: Abdennacer-Badaoui

vllm.title: [PD] Change kv_load_failure_policy Default from "recompute" to "fail"
vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Address #32200.
In light of discussions on the topic, in particular of

Users will incorrectly set up their P/D deployment and see very poor performance due to failed transfers without realizing that actual failures are happening

I think we should just straight change default behavior.
cc @tlrmchls

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Gate 256-bit instructions to CUDA 12.9+
vllm.author: huydhn
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
#33022 recently enables 256-bit instructions on vLLM activation kernels, but this is only available in CUDA 12.9+. With this change, building vLLM on CUDA 12.8 is now failing with the following error:
FAILED: [code=255] CMakeFiles/_C.dir/csrc/activation_kernels.cu.o
/usr/local/cuda/bin/nvcc

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix Qwen3/Qwen3.5 Reasoning Parser
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose

Fix the qwen3 reasoning parser to work with Qwen3.5 models (e.g., Qwen/Qwen3.5-397B-A17B) where the chat template places <think> in the prompt rather than having the model generate it. Previously the parser required both <think> and </think> in the generated output, causing it to fail for Q
